raw:
## Completed
Implemented Foreman task requirements support end-to-end: planner schema, manifest persistence, Gate 1 rendering/probing, non-blocking preflight advisories, planner/CTO docs, and unit coverage.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/gates.ts` - added requirement types, normalization, empty check, and `loadRequirements`.
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - added requirements to plans/manifests, manifest write decisions, presence evaluation, summaries, and Requirements rendering.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - wired PATH/env probing, Gate 1 requirement checks/logging, manifest persistence, and non-blocking preflight advisories.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md` - taught planner to detect env/tool/service requirements safely.
- `extensions/foreman/AGENTS.md` - documented proactive CTO Gate 1 ask behavior.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md` - documented advisory requirement relay and secret handling.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` - added planner/manifest/render/presence/preflight wiring coverage.
- `extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh` - added requirements normalization/load coverage.

## How To Verify
`grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification command above passes. `git status` also shows unrelated existing `.pi/plans` ledger dirt/untracked plan dirs; implementation changes are scoped to the files listed.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
